hero_subtitle: Detailed guide to help you choose the right laptop and shop safely
step_1_desc: Browse categories or search for products you're interested in
step_2_desc: Choose configuration and quantity, then add to cart
step_3_desc: Choose payment method and complete your order
step_4_desc: Your product will be delivered within 3-5 days
tips_selection_1: CPU (Processor): Higher performance is better, Intel i5/i7 or AMD Ryzen 5/7 are good choices
tips_selection_2: RAM (Memory): 8GB is enough for daily work, 16GB for design/programming, 32GB for professionals
tips_selection_3: SSD (Storage): 256GB for basic, 512GB for comfortable use, 1TB if you need large storage
tips_selection_4: GPU (Graphics Chip): RTX 3050 or RTX 4050 are suitable for gaming, AMD equivalent
tips_choice_1: Determine usage purpose: Study, work, design or gaming?
tips_choice_2: Set your budget: From 5-10 million (basic) to 20 million+ (premium)
tips_choice_3: Check weight: If carrying often, choose under 1.5kg; if stationary, heavier is fine
tips_choice_4: Check ports: USB-C, HDMI, audio jack... enough for your needs
tips_buying_1: Read product info carefully: Configuration, color, warranty... to avoid confusion
tips_buying_2: Compare prices: Check prices of similar products elsewhere
tips_buying_3: Check reviews: Read customer comments to know product quality
tips_buying_4: Take advantage of promotions: Follow promotions to save money
tips_after_1: Check package: Verify box is intact and product has all accessories
tips_after_2: Power on check: Turn on to verify machine works properly
tips_after_3: Keep receipt: Keep receipt for warranty or returns
tips_after_4: Register warranty: If needed, register extended warranty on manufacturer's website
faq_1_answer: Usually 3-5 business days. Remote areas may take 7-10 days.
faq_2_answer: Yes, we offer free shipping for orders over 3 million VND in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City.
faq_3_answer: You have 7 days from delivery to exchange or return if there's a technical issue or it doesn't suit you.
faq_4_answer: We accept: Bank transfer, VNPAY, Momo, credit card, and cash on delivery.
faq_5_answer: All laptops have genuine manufacturer warranty from 12-24 months, depending on manufacturer.
faq_6_question: Can I inspect products before buying?
faq_6_answer: Yes, you can visit our stores to view and inspect products before purchase.
contact_description: Contact us for free consultation on how to choose the right laptop
